mechanism: Refinancing $2.5T at 300bp+ higher coupons directly increases WACC for the S&P 493, further compressing already-tight ROIC-WACC spreads and amplifying equity rate sensitivity through the fundamental earnings channel.
regime_dependence: Time-stamped: concentrated 2025-2027. Impact diminishes if rates fall materially before peak refinancing or if private credit substitution absorbs a significant portion.
